message:
fix(core): ORDER BY non-SELECT columns in JOINs, add PRAGMAs and probe tests

Fix sort_rows_by_order_terms for JOIN queries where ORDER BY references
columns not in the SELECT list (e.g. ORDER BY e.id when SELECT only has
e.name, d.name). Extra ORDER BY columns are now temporarily projected
from the combined join row, used for sorting, then stripped.

Add PRAGMA integrity_check, quick_check, data_version, and encoding.
Add 7 comprehensive probe tests covering ~80+ SQL patterns including
type coercion, self-joins, correlated subqueries, and complex WHERE.

1559 tests passed, 0 failures. Clippy + fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
